title: SR SUPER RIBBONS®™ Quality Reels Grosgrain Ribbon, 3mm 6mm 10mm 15mm 25mm & 40mm 20/50 Metre on Hard Plastic Reels (Baby Blue, 15mm x 20m)

description: From the manufacturer Welcome to our Quality Grosgrain Ribbon Listing. Colour: We have 18 different colours available for you to choose from. You can select white, Off-White, Cream, Baby Pink, Hot Pink, Red, Baby Blue, Royal Blue, Navy, Black, Green, Forest Green, Charcoal, Natural, Grey, Burgundy, Yellow & Purple, from the drop-down menu above. Our Grosgrain Ribbon is premium quality. It is perfect for card making, clothing, crafts, decorations, gift wrapping, florists, flowers and weddings. All of our Grosgrain Ribbon is supplied on good Quality Reels. Dimensions: Length: 50/20 Meters Width: 3mm 6mm 10mm 15mm 25mm 40mm About Super Ribbons Super Ribbons is a UK-based company providing high-quality ribbons in many different colours and widths. Quality Grosgrain Ribbon high quality ribbon on strong plastic spools Perfect for any occasion whether it's a wedding, Christmas or even a birthday Our Fabric ribbon are made of 100% polyester, and the satin ribbon is smooth shiny and luxurious.
